subject: [PATCH v2 15/21] fuse: add passthrough support for create+open

2026-05-16.patch_summary: This patch adds passthrough support for create and open operations in the FUSE (Filesystem in Userspace) driver. When FUSE_PASSTHROUGH_INO is enabled, it uses the extended fuse_entry2_out reply to associate a newly created inode with a backing file for passthrough operations before instantiating the dentry. This allows for more efficient handling of create and open requests by reusing existing resources.
